patch.value:
Scope:
- Verify package metadata, license, CI, generated dist output, and npm package contents.
- Verify the complete git history does not expose private credentials or private key material.
- Verify the package installs and runs from a clean temporary project through the pm package manager and standalone CLI.
- Ensure GitHub repository settings use only free features and match public package expectations.
- Use pm-changelog itself to regenerate CHANGELOG.md from closed pm items before release.
Release pm-changelog 0.1.0 as a production-ready pm package

Govern the full release-readiness effort for pm-changelog, including package metadata, repository hygiene, secret-history review, GitHub configuration, changelog generation, and independent installation testing.

- All child features, tasks, chores, and issues are closed with verification evidence.
- npm test, npm run release:check, npm audit --omit=dev, npm pack --dry-run, and a temp-folder install/use test pass.
- CHANGELOG.md is generated by this package from closed pm items.
- Git history secret scan has no confirmed private data findings.
- GitHub repository metadata is aligned for release using only free GitHub features.

value.command: name=temp install verification,command=manual temp project install and pm changelog generate

patch.value: Completed production-readiness hardening, secret-history audit, GitHub setup, temp install verification, strict pm governance, and self-hosted changelog preparation for pm-changelog 0.1.0.

pm-changelog is ready for release with clean tests, clean production audit, verified package contents, public GitHub metadata, no confirmed private data in git history, and generated changelog output.

All child items are closed with evidence. GitHub is public and configured. Temp install verification passed. Secret history audit found no confirmed private data. Final changelog generation and release:check are the remaining execution steps after epic closure.

value.author: codex
value.text: Closing parent epic before final changelog generation ensures CHANGELOG.md includes the complete release readiness hierarchy.

patch.value: Release-readiness work is complete; all child items are closed and final changelog/release checks are ready to run.
